title: PaQoL
description: A collection of the best performance and QoL mods to make your potato of a computer run smoothly
body:
## What Dis?

This is a _lightwheight_ modpack aiming for making a potato run smooth without baking it. (potato means computer for all you non gamers)

Tried and tested, sucesfuly made my mothers brick run nicely.
For errors, or future updates, please email me at *enderVue@outlook.com*
## **Whats in it?**
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>
  
<details>
<summary>Performance Mods</summary>
  
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**: A rendering engine replacement that improves frame rates.
- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)**: Skips rendering Block/Entities that are not visible.
- **[FerritCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**: Drasticly reduces the memory usage of the game
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**: No compromises game logic optimization engine
- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)**: Speeds up immediate mlde rendering in game
- **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)**: Stops your game from taking your FPS when not in game
- **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)**: Improves networking stack
- **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)**: Fixes block entities so they dont take so much cpu and gpu
- **[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)**: Fixes all of Minecrafts unfixed bugs
- **[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)**: Improves the chunk rendering engine to be more efficient and less demanding
- **[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)**: Improves the player rendering performance on servers
- **[FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer)**: Reduces extra cpu and gpu load when unused
- **[Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis)**: Speeds up world creation/loading time
- **[Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)**: Optimizes particles
- **[Better Grassify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify)**: Optimizes grass rendering and prettify it
- **[Scalable Lux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)**: Improves lighting engine

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>QoL Mods</summary>
  
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-menu)**: Provides an in-game menu for managing mods.
- **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**: Connects all textures of same type, so glass blocks next to eachother will look nice
- **[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)**: Adds a nice configurable minimap in the top right corner
- **[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)**: Provides a full-screen configurable in-game map with waypoint support
- **[XaeroPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeroplus)**: Provides a bunch of improvements to Xareo's maps
- **[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)**: Improves the F3 menu for readibility and makes it more pretty
- **[Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)**: Improves the statistics screen for readibility and makes it more pretty
- **[Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)**: Improves the advancements screen for readibility and makes it more pretty
- **[Better Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettertab)**: Improves the player list and ping
- **[Better Enchantment Order](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-enchantment-order)**: Makes tooltip enchantment order go from highest to lowest
- **[Better Block Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-tooltip)**: Makes block tooltip more detailed, including things like blast resistence
- **[Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)**: Changes crosshair appearance based on context
- **[Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)**: Exactly what it sounds
- **[No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)**: Exactly what it sounds
- **[Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights)**: Provides dynamic lights for sodium
- **[Sodium Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extras)**: Provides even more options for sodium
- **[Sodium Mod Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-options-mod-compat)**: Makes Sodium compatible with more mods
- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)**: Provides extra Sodium options
- **[Resse's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)**: Provides extra Sodium options as well as a better menu
- **[Accurate Block Placement Rebborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn)**: Makes placing blocks faster and much more accurate
- **[Mod Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-loading-screen)**: Adds preloading screen with progress of each mod
- **[Keybind Fix Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybind-fix-plus)**: Fixes a bunch of keybind bugs and allows two actions on one key
- **[Armor Durability HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-durability-hud)**: Adds vanila like on screen display of your armor and their durability in fraction form
- **[EnhancedTooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedtooltips)**: Improves tooltip readability and details
- **[Anti Item Break](https://modrinth.com/mod/anti-item-break)**: Stops you from using tools if at 1 durability

- **[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)**: Tells you what block you are looking at and what you need to mine it
</details>

<details>
<summary>Code Libraries</summary>
  
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
- **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)**
- **[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)**
- **[YetAnotherConfigLib ](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)**
- **[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)**
- **[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)**
- **[CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)**
- **[TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tcdcommons)**
- **[Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config)**
- **[LibJF](https://modrinth.com/mod/libjf)**
- **[Sodium Options API](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-options-api)**
- **[TxniLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/txnilib)**

</details>

</details>
<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- **[Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x)**: Makes the world pretty
- **[Fullbright SP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fullbright-sp)**: A sodium compatible Fullbright
</details>
